subcodes.first_line: O thou who art serving the world of humanity! Thy letter was received and from its contents we felt exceedingly glad
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای خادمه عالم انسانی نامه ات رسید و از مضمون بسیار ممنون شدیم برهانی قاطع بود
subcodes.subjects: @the golden rule; regard for one's neighbor; doing unto others, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @love and unity, @words vs deeds, @serving humanity; working for progress, betterment of the world, @oneness; unity of religion
